description: A brokerage manager needs to verify that all agents in the office have renewed their real estate licenses and completed their continuing education.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all agents affiliated with the brokerage.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has a complete roster of licensed agents.

nodes.task_description: For each agent, search the state's real estate commission license lookup portal.

expected_outcome.expected: The manager checks each agent's license status on the official state website.

nodes.task_description: Identify any agents with expired licenses or upcoming renewal dates and send them a reminder.

expected_outcome.expected: The manager finds one agent whose license expires next month and sends them a reminder notice.
